response.overview: A young artist locked in a silent tug‑of‑war with her own perfectionism pushes her painting to the edge, risking that her passion will drown her in self-doubt.
response.tagline: A young artist locked in a silent tug‑of‑war with her own perfectionism pushes her painting to the edge, risking that her passion will drown her in self-doubt
response.title: You're Perfect
